working_on.notes: Version 1.3.5 successfully packaged and documented with new 3-tier connectivity states and Home button mapping.

recent_changes.description: Version 1.3.5: Added 3-tier connectivity states, Home button mapping, and fixed Wi-Fi/BT detection bugs.
Rollback Material 3 UI aesthetics to Legacy theme while keeping functional improvements.

errors_encountered.error: Connectivity icons remain White (Disconnected) despite being connected on emulator
errors_encountered.solution: Refactor to use ConnectivityManager capabilities check and AudioManager fallback for A2DP presence.

errors_encountered.error: Deprecation warnings for WifiInfo.connectionInfo and Icons.Rounded.Chat
errors_encountered.solution: Suppressed Wifi warning and migrated to Icons.AutoMirrored.Rounded.Chat with explicit import.

decisions_made.decision: Use pseudo-app ACTION_HOME for Home button mapping
decisions_made.reason: Avoids the need for Accessibility Service permissions, improving user on-boarding UX.
Clearer visual feedback for drive-focused environments.
